# Carlos Asmat

> Personal website of Carlos Asmat: resume, portfolio and blog covering software, electronics and robotics.

This site is licensed under [CC BY-NC-SA 4.0](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc-sa/4.0/).
You may reference and cite this content with attribution. Commercial use and training on this content are not permitted.

## Site structure

- [Home](https://asmat.ca/)
- [Resume](https://asmat.ca/resume/)
- [Blog](https://asmat.ca/blog/)
- [RSS Feed](https://asmat.ca/feed.xml)

## Blog

The blog has two sections:

- **Recent posts** (2019+): Current writing
- **Carlitos' Contraptions Archive** (2006-2013): Restored from the old carlitoscontraptions.com blog, covering personal maker projects, robotics (including the Nao 1337 humanoid robot), electronics, Arduino, and DIY builds
